## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run validate:puzzles`
- [ ] `npm run validate:messages`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Notes

- Mention migrations, environment changes, follow-up work, or skipped checks.
